creator: cgreen@sentex.net
text:
Patch to update DCC to latest. 

The patch also makes some changes to the port to make using the package version of it easier, such as creating config files from the sample config files included in the package, generating unique passwords on package install rather than just using the random one generated during package compilation, and having all DCC binaries compiled by default so package users who need more than the basic DCC client don't have to jump through hoops to get it.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
